title: Plan and monitor production processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and monitor production processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine production process requirements

pcs.text: Access information about the products being grown or manufactured and the market
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access information about the products being grown or manufactured and the market?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access information about the products being grown or manufactured and the market.

pcs.text: Confirm characteristics of the land under production and the quality of associated infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm characteristics of the land under production and the quality of associated infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm characteristics of the land under production and the quality of associated infrastructure.

pcs.text: Analyse recent and historical data from organisational records for input to production planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse recent and historical data from organisational records for input to production planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse recent and historical data from organisational records for input to production planning.

pcs.text: Identify potential for improvements or innovations to inform production planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential for improvements or innovations to inform production planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential for improvements or innovations to inform production planning.

pcs.text: Identify production processes required to achieve the targeted production and compare with those that currently exist
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify production processes required to achieve the targeted production and compare with those that currently exist?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify production processes required to achieve the targeted production and compare with those that currently exist.

pcs.text: Check production planning information is fed into other organisational planning processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check production planning information is fed into other organisational planning processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check production planning information is fed into other organisational planning processes.

elements.title: Plan production and monitoring systems

pcs.text: Establish targets for the enterprise, for each product, crop, herd or flock using information from organisational management and strategic plans

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish targets for the enterprise, for each product, crop, herd or flock using information from organisational management and strategic plans.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule production processes taking organisational factors into consideration.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish waste management controls to minimise waste and dispose of waste sustainably.

pcs.text: Establish monitoring points and performance indicators using target, environmental management and scheduling information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish monitoring points and performance indicators using target, environmental management and scheduling information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish monitoring points and performance indicators using target, environmental management and scheduling information.

pcs.text: Establish appropriate biosecurity and quality assurance requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish appropriate biosecurity and quality assurance requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish appropriate biosecurity and quality assurance requirements.

pcs.text: Establish risk management strategies to control hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish risk management strategies to control hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish risk management strategies to control hazards.

pcs.text: Document the production plan, including targets and monitoring requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the production plan, including targets and monitoring requirements.
